channel.title: Test on Beyond The Bedside
channel.description: Recent content in Test on Beyond The Bedside

item.title: Format Test
item.description:
This is a normal paragraph. It has multiple sentences. This is how your body text looks on the site.

This is a second paragraph. Notice there is a blank line above — that is what creates a new paragraph in Hugo. A single Enter in Obsidian does not create a new paragraph here.

This is a Heading 2

Use H2 for main sections inside your post. Your post title is already H1 so never use H1 inside the body.
